title: EooCoo Digital Visual Timer for Kids, 99-Minute Silent Countdown Count Up Rotation Productivity Timers, Color Petal Progress, Mins/Secs Switch, Time Management Education Tool for School, Office, ADHD
features: 【Precision Countdown & Countup Timer】Maximise productivity with our 99-minute 55-second digital timer offering countdown/up-timing modes. Set increments down to the second via intuitive toggle switches, while the LCD displays real-time progress with a visual percentage bar – perfect for interval training, exams, or kitchen timer use. The digits ensure visibility across busy classrooms or kitchens. Exceeds standard countdown timer capabilities with surgical precision timing.

【Classroom-Ready Visual Timer for Kids】Engineered as the ultimate visual timers for kids, it transforms time management into an engaging learning tool. The color petals progress bar helps children grasp abstract time concepts visually – ideal for classroom activities, homework sessions, or behaviour management. A true teacher essentials must-have that outperforms basic time timer models with enhanced functionality. Powered by 2 x AAA batteries (INCLUDED!) - No charging, no delays.

【Effortless Setting & Smart Auto-Save】The slide-switch mechanism lets you rapidly toggle between minutes/sconds adjustment: flick right for quick minute-setting, left for precise second-tweaking. The setup time is time-saving and labor-saving. Never lose track again! Our kids timer automatically memorises your last used setting upon restart – whether interrupted pomodoro timer sessions or partially completed baking cycles.

【Customisable Alerts & Eco-Mode】Adapt alerts to any environment: choose discreet flashing petal patterns for libraries (silent mode), gentle beeps for offices (low volume), or alarms for noisy workshops (high volume). The 10-minute auto-sleep conserves power during inactivity, while instant wake-up requires just a simple button press or dial rotation to resume operation.

【Versatile & Portable Visual Timer - Master of All Scenes】 Perfect for endless activities! Be it timing the egg timer for perfect boiled eggs in the kitchen, structuring classroom activities and study sessions, boosting focus during work, tracking workouts at the gym, managing game time, or countless other daily tasks. Compact and easy to carry to classrooms, kitchens, the gym, or your office desk. A simple tool to track time effectively anywhere.

【Thoughtful Gift for All Ages】 This versatile timer serves as both a practical daily tool and meaningful present, ideal for children developing time management skills, students using ADHD aids for focus, or seniors appreciating simplicity. Perfect as stocking stuffers, holiday surprises (Christmas, Halloween, Father's/Mother's Day), back-to-school essentials, birthday gifts, Children's Day treats, teacher appreciation presents, or college care package additions.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 How to use 2 Key Description Previous page Next page Does it have a loud alarm? Yes, It features a three-tier alert (silent flash/low/high volume). The powerful high-volume alarm ensures users with time awareness issues never miss alerts in noisy settings like gyms. Flexibility supports precise timing, adapting to libraries. Can it be used for time management? Definitely. It features both countdown and count-up modes (max 99:59), settable to the exact second. Ideal for exam prep, homework, puzzles, , office meetings, cooking, meditation, workouts, parenting, and therapy sessions. Does it require batteries? Yes, it requires batteries (included) and incorporates a power-saving feature: the screen auto-off after 10 minutes of inactivity extends battery life. This design ensures portability for on-the-go use, like in classrooms or outdoor activities. Is it good for teaching kids? Definitely. Excellent for teaching children (especially ASD). Its memory function saves settings for smooth transitions, and simple buttons make it faster and more engaging than phone timers – perfect for classroom routines or therapy sessions. Is this timer easy to read? Of course. Exceptionally readable with an ergonomic tilt for optimal viewing. Features instant visual cues: bold digits showing time, a shrinking petal ring for progress, and a prominent % indicator for time remaining – all clear at a glance.
